title: Letter by Jamila Buzaglo about Eugene Delacroix drawing, 1832 (Solitreo script)

handwriting.notes: Letter written in Solitreo (a Hebrew-script cursive used for Judeo-Spanish/Ladino). Hebrew script is the operative scope criterion; Ladino-in-Solitreo trains the same character recognisers as Hebrew-language material and is in scope.

rights.evidence_text: Commons file page tags this scan PD-old-100: the letter dates from 1832-06-15, making it 194 years old — public domain under the age-of-work rule independently of any life+70 calculation. The death year of Jamila Buzaglo is not established in standard authority records; this is immaterial because PD-old-100 does not require it. Rights basis verified on the Commons file page.

provenance.notes: Downloaded from Wikimedia Commons via upload.wikimedia.org. File page verified for license (PD-old-100). Image sourced from http://www.vocesdehaquetia.com/fotografias.html, courtesy of Centre de la Culture Judeo-Marocaine.

quality.notes: 712x618 pixel scan of a handwritten Solitreo letter. Legibility is moderate; individual characters are distinguishable.

title: Late 19th-century Rabbinic contract from Jerusalem written in Solitreo script

handwriting.notes: Rabbinic contract written in Solitreo (Hebrew cursive script). Likely Hebrew or Hebrew/Aramaic text as is typical for rabbinic legal documents.

rights.evidence_text: Commons file page applies PD-Art|PD-old-70: the underlying document dates from approximately 1880 (c. 145 years old), placing it in the public domain under the age-of-work rule. PD-Art additionally means no separate copyright arises in the faithful photographic reproduction of the scan. The creator is unknown; the standard life+70 author-death check is inapplicable — the age-of-work route is the operative PD basis here, and it is independently sufficient. Rights basis verified on the Commons file page.

provenance.notes: Downloaded from Wikimedia Commons via upload.wikimedia.org. File page verified for license (PD-Art|PD-old-70). Sourced from https://www.jewishartifacteducation.com/sephardic-customs.

quality.notes: 1300x966 pixel scan of a Solitreo script rabbinic contract. Good resolution for HTR research on Solitreo script.
